title: Tricalysia allenii
taxonomy: Tricalysia allenii is classified within the family Rubiaceae, which is a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the coffee or madder family. This family is part of the order Gentianales, which includes other flowering plants such as gentians and oleanders. Within the Rubiaceae family, Tricalysia allenii is further classified into the genus Tricalysia, which consists of various species of flowering plants found in tropical regions. The genus Tricalysia is a part of the tribe Palicoureeae, which is a subfamily within the Rubiaceae family. The classification of Tricalysia allenii reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants within the Rubiaceae family.
